_meta.note: Small real-shaped starter set. Full production set is 99 verified regional dishes (MAFF 'Our Regional Cuisines' + web verification). Cultural narrative is [CANONICAL] ONLY if the dish is here; otherwise it is [INFERRED] and must be flagged. Do not generate authoritative origin stories.

entries.narrative_en: Mackerel salted and then fermented in rice bran (nuka) for over a year, a Wakasa-region preservation method. Eaten lightly grilled or sliced thin.
Vinegared rice topped with mackerel or salmon, wrapped in a persimmon leaf. Originated as a way to preserve fish carried inland from the coast.
